## Compliance check

- [ ] No guaranteed funding approval language added.
- [ ] No underwriting decision language added.
- [ ] No tax, legal, accounting, investment, securities, or lending approval advice added.
- [ ] Financial outputs remain framed as planning and decision support.

## Secrets and data check

- [ ] No API keys, tokens, OAuth credentials, webhook secrets, private keys, or database URLs added.
- [ ] No real client financial data added.
- [ ] No `.env.local` or production env files added.
- [ ] Examples use synthetic data only.

## API / OpenAPI check
